mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_ui.wechat_user ( openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, province, city, gender, role, status, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{province}, #{city}, #{gender}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'guest'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'), now() ) ON CONFLICT (openid) DO UPDATE SET unionid = excluded.unionid, province = COALESCE(excluded.province, agent_ui.wechat_user.province), city = COALESCE(excluded.city, agent_ui.wechat_user.city), gender = COALESCE(excluded.gender, agent_ui.wechat_user.gender), updated_at = now()
mapper.select: SELECT id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, province, city, gender, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_ui.wechat_user WHERE openid = #{openid}
SELECT id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, province, city, gender, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_ui.wechat_user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, openid, unionid, nickname, avatar_url, province, city, gender, role, status, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_ui.wechat_user ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 500
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_ui.wechat_user SET role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agent_ui.wechat_user SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE agent_ui.wechat_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
